traits.name: Weakspot Exploit
traits.desc: When you roll maximum damage on your weapon die, ignore Armor DR for that attack (Dodge DR still applies).

traits.name: Brutal Swing
traits.desc: When using a Heavy weapon: if Success Level ≥ 2, add +1 damage; on Critical Success, add +2 instead.

traits.name: Flurry
traits.desc: Once per round, you may make one Light weapon attack at 0 AP cost during your activation.

traits.name: Executioner
traits.desc: When you reduce a target to 0 HP with an attack, refund the AP cost of that attack. If it was a Reaction Attack, refund the RAP spent.

traits.name: Calculated Strike
traits.desc: Before making a melee or ranged attack, you may spend additional AP to gain +10 to the attack roll per AP (max +30).

traits.name: Evasive Footwork
traits.desc: Your first Dodge each round costs 0 RAP.

traits.name: Reactive Guard
traits.desc: When you successfully Dodge, gain +1 Armor DR until your next activation.

traits.name: Iron Body
traits.desc: Once per round, reduce final damage taken by 1 (after all DR).

traits.name: Unyielding Mind
traits.desc: When you fail a Mental check, you do not lose AP (critical failure effects still apply).

traits.name: Swift Riposte
traits.desc: Your Reaction Attacks cost 1 less RAP (minimum 1).

traits.name: Intercepting Reach
traits.desc: You may make a Reaction Attack when an enemy enters your melee reach, even if they began movement outside your reach.

reactions.name: Reaction Attack: Entering Reach
reactions.rapCost: weapon AP cost (modified by traits; minimum 1)
reactions.text: Trigger: an enemy enters your melee reach. Effect: you may make a Reaction Attack against that enemy.

traits.name: Lockdown
traits.desc: When you hit a target with a Reaction Attack, their movement speed becomes 0 for the rest of that movement action.

traits.name: Opportunist
traits.desc: When an enemy within your melee reach is attacked by another character, you may spend RAP equal to your weapon’s AP cost to make a Reaction Attack against that enemy (works with Light, Normal, or Heavy weapons).

reactions.name: Reaction Attack: Opportunist
reactions.text: Trigger: an enemy within your melee reach is attacked by another character. Effect: make a Reaction Attack against that enemy.

traits.name: Grappler
traits.desc: You gain access to the Grapple action.

actions.name: Grapple
actions.text: Replace a melee attack with a Grapple attempt: roll Melee vs target Dodge. On success: target becomes Grappled (cannot move). Escape: target spends 2 AP to roll Dodge opposed by your active Melee; compare Success Levels (higher wins). Grapple ends if the grappler is incapacitated.

traits.name: Disarm
traits.desc: On Success Level ≥ 3 with a melee attack, the target must succeed a Dodge check or drop their weapon.

traits.name: Mobile Skirmisher
traits.desc: Once per round, move up to half your base movement for 0 AP. This movement does not trigger Reaction Attacks.

traits.name: Suppressive Fire
traits.desc: Each successful ranged attack forces the target to make a Mental check; on failure, the target loses 1 RAP next round.

traits.name: Deadeye
traits.desc: When making ranged attacks, rolls of 10, 20, 30, 40, etc. that are successful (≤ skill) count as Critical Success.

traits.name: Perfect Form
traits.desc: When you roll doubles on an attack and it is a Critical Success, deal extra damage equal to the units of the critical (eg 33=+3 damage).

traits.name: Armor Breaker
traits.desc: On a successful Heavy weapon hit, reduce the target’s Armor DR by 1 until the start of your next activation (does not stack).

traits.name: Martial Artist
traits.desc: Unarmed attacks count as Light weapons; damage becomes 1d3 + floor(Might/3). You may apply Light-weapon traits (such as Flurry) to unarmed attacks.
